package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for double_close_local_channel: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: The same locally created channel appears to be closed more than once in one function body.
type CaseDoubleCloseLocalChannelDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseDoubleCloseLocalChannelModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseDoubleCloseLocalChannelRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseDoubleCloseLocalChannelModel
}

type CaseDoubleCloseLocalChannelService struct {
    repo *CaseDoubleCloseLocalChannelRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseDoubleCloseLocalChannelAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeDoubleCloseLocalChannel(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseDoubleCloseLocalChannelDTO) error {
    focus := "double_close_local_channel"
    _ = focus
    ch := make(chan string, 1)
    ch <- input
    close(ch)
    double_close_local_channel_negative := map[string]int{"double": 1, "close": 2, "local": 3, "channel": 4}
    double_close_local_channel_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    double_negative_0 := double_close_local_channel_negative["double"] + len(input)
    _ = double_negative_0
    close_negative_1 := double_close_local_channel_negative["close"] + len(input)
    _ = close_negative_1
    local_negative_2 := double_close_local_channel_negative["local"] + len(input)
    _ = local_negative_2
    channel_negative_3 := double_close_local_channel_negative["channel"] + len(input)
    _ = channel_negative_3
    return nil
}
